languages.text: "Было дело. Я тогда только полковником стал. Она вылезла не так близко, но все равно мешала сильно, одно поселение почти сожрала. Я взял отряд, отца и пошел ее бить. Все полегли, а отец последние гранаты, которые у нас были, взял и в пасть Погонщице прыгнул. Тварь досыта наелась и уползла. И мне бы там искупление обрести, да выкарабкался. Если бы меньше яда в детстве получал, точно бы там подох".

"A long time ago. I'd just become colonel. Out it came — not very close, but still close enough to be a problem. It almost gobbled up one of the outposts. My father and I took a squad and went out to attack it. They all perished and my father took our remaining grenades and leapt into the Drover's maw. The beast ate its fill and slunk away. I should have found my atonement there, but I made it out. If I hadn't been exposed to so much of its poison as a child, I would have died there."
languages.original_text: "Было дело. Я тогда только полковником стал. Она вылезла не так близко, но все равно мешала сильно, одно поселение почти сожрала. Я взял отряд, отца и пошел ее бить. Все полегли, а отец последние гранаты, которые у нас были, взял и в пасть Погонщице прыгнул. Тварь досыта наелась и уползла. И мне бы там искупление обрести, да выкарабкался. Если бы меньше яда в детстве получал, точно бы там подох".

traits.locale_text: "A long time ago. I'd just become a colonel. Out it came — not very close, but still close enough to be a problem. It almost gobbled up one of the outposts. I took a squad and my father and went to attack it. They all perished, but my father took our remaining grenades and leapt into the Drover's maw. The beast ate its fill and slunk away. I should have found my redemption there, but I made it out. If I hadn't ingested so much poison as a child, I would have died there."

"A long time ago. I'd just become a colonel. Out it came — not very close, but still close enough to be a problem. It almost gobbled up one of the outposts. My father and I took a squad and went out to attack it. They all perished and my father took our remaining grenades and leaped into the Drover's maw. The beast ate its fill and slunk away. I should have found my atonement there, but I made it out. If I hadn't been exposed to so much of its poison as a child, I would have died there."

"A long time ago. I'd just become colonel. Out it came — not very close, but still close enough to be a problem. And I was still young. I decided, like a fool, to use it to shore up my authority. I took a squad and went to attack it. I got the better of it, you could say, and it went into hiding for a long time. But I was the only one who came back alive. And I barely made it back. If I hadn't ingested so much poison as a child, I would have died there."

"A long time ago. I'd just become a colonel. Out it came — not very close, but still close enough to be a problem. It almost gobbled up one of the outposts. I took a squad and my father and went to attack it. They all perished, but my father took our remaining grenades and leapt into the Drover's maw. The beast ate its fill and slunk away. I should have found my redemption there, but I made it out. If I hadn't ingested so much poison as a child, I would have died there."

"A long time ago. I'd just become a colonel. Out it came — not very close, but still close enough to be a problem. It almost gobbled up one of the outposts. My father and I took a squad and went out to attack it. They all perished and my father took our remaining grenades and leaped into the Drover's maw. The beast ate its fill and slunk away. I should have found my atonement there, but I made it out. If I hadn't been exposed to so much of its poison as a child, I would have died there."

"A long time ago. I'd just become colonel. Out it came — not very close, but still close enough to be a problem. It almost gobbled up one of the outposts. My father and I took a squad and went out to attack it. They all perished and my father took our remaining grenades and leapt into the Drover's maw. The beast ate its fill and slunk away. I should have found my atonement there, but I made it out. If I hadn't been exposed to so much of its poison as a child, I would have died there."

languages.text: 「昔のことです。私が大佐になったばかりの頃、その存在が明らかになりました。距離は離れていましたが、それでも問題になるほどでした。私はまだ若かった。愚かな決断で、その存在を消すために部隊を率いて攻撃しました。何とか撃退しましたが、その存在は長い間姿を消しました。しかし、生き残ったのは私だけでした。私は命からがら帰ってきました。幼い頃に毒を大量に摂取していなければ、そこで死んでいたでしょう」
languages.original_text: "A long time ago. I'd just become colonel. Out it came — not very close, but still close enough to be a problem. And I was still young. I decided, like a fool, to use it to shore up my authority. I took a squad and went to attack it. I got the better of it, you could say, and it went into hiding for a long time. But I was the only one who came back alive. And I barely made it back. If I hadn't ingested so much poison as a child, I would have died there."

traits.locale_text: 「昔のことです。私が大佐になったばかりの頃、その存在が明らかになりました。距離は離れていましたが、それでも問題になるほどでした。私はまだ若かった。愚かな決断で、その存在を消すために部隊を率いて攻撃しました。何とか撃退しましたが、その存在は長い間姿を消しました。しかし、生き残ったのは私だけでした。私は命からがら帰ってきました。幼い頃に毒を大量に摂取していなければ、そこで死んでいたでしょう。」

languages.text: « Il y a bien longtemps, oui. Je venais d'être nommé colonel. Il a surgi sans prévenir, suffisamment près pour représenter une menace, et il a bien failli engloutir l'un des avant-postes. Alors, mon père et moi nous sommes lancés à l'attaque à la tête d'une escouade. Tous nos hommes sont morts et mon père s'est emparé des grenades restantes avant de se jeter dans la gueule du Chasseur. Une fois repue, la bête est repartie d'où elle était venue. J'aurais dû trouver la rédemption au cours de ce combat, mais j'ai survécu. Si je n'avais pas été aussi souvent exposé au poison dans mon enfance, je serais mort à coup sûr. »
languages.original_text: "A long time ago. I'd just become colonel. Out it came — not very close, but still close enough to be a problem. It almost gobbled up one of the outposts. My father and I took a squad and went out to attack it. They all perished and my father took our remaining grenades and leapt into the Drover's maw. The beast ate its fill and slunk away. I should have found my atonement there, but I made it out. If I hadn't been exposed to so much of its poison as a child, I would have died there."

traits.locale_text: « Il y a bien longtemps, oui. Je venais d'être nommé colonel. Il a surgi sans prévenir, suffisamment près pour représenter une menace, et il a bien failli engloutir l'un des avant-postes. Alors, mon père et moi nous sommes lancés à l'attaque à la tête d'une escouade. Tous nos hommes sont morts et mon père s'est emparé des grenades restantes avant de se jeter dans la gueule du Chasseur. Une fois repue, la bête est repartie d'où elle était venue. J'aurais dû trouver la rédemption au cours de ce combat, mais j'ai survécu. Si je n'avais pas été aussi souvent exposé au poison dans mon enfance, je serais mort à coup sûr. »

languages.text: "Uzun zaman önce. Daha yeni albay olmuştum. Dışarı çıktı. Çok yakın değildi ama yine de sorun olacak kadar yakındı. Neredeyse karakollardan birini yutacaktı. Babamla ben bir manga aldık ve ona saldırmak için dışarı çıktık. Hepsi can verdi. Babam, kalan el bombalarımızı alıp Çoban'ın ağzına atladı. Canavar karnını doyurdu ve gizlice uzaklaştı. Kefaretimi orada ödemeliydim ama kurtuldum. Çocukken o kadar çok zehrine maruz kalmasaydım oracıkta ölürdüm."
languages.original_text: "A long time ago. I'd just become colonel. Out it came — not very close, but still close enough to be a problem. It almost gobbled up one of the outposts. My father and I took a squad and went out to attack it. They all perished and my father took our remaining grenades and leapt into the Drover's maw. The beast ate its fill and slunk away. I should have found my atonement there, but I made it out. If I hadn't been exposed to so much of its poison as a child, I would have died there."

traits.locale_text: "Uzun zaman önce. Daha yeni albay olmuştum. Dışarı çıktı. Çok yakın değildi ama yine de sorun olacak kadar yakındı. Neredeyse karakollardan birini yutacaktı. Babamla ben bir manga aldık ve ona saldırmak için dışarı çıktık. Hepsi can verdi. Babam, kalan el bombalarımızı alıp Çoban'ın ağzına atladı. Canavar karnını doyurdu ve gizlice uzaklaştı. Kefaretimi orada ödemeliydim ama kurtuldum. Çocukken o kadar çok zehrine maruz kalmasaydım oracıkta ölürdüm."

languages.text: «Hace mucho tiempo. Acababa de convertirme en coronel. Apareció de repente, no muy cerca, pero lo bastante para causar problemas. Casi se traga entero uno de los puestos de avanzada. Mi padre y yo formamos una escuadra y fuimos al ataque. Murieron todos, y mi padre cogió las últimas granadas que nos quedaban y se arrojó a las mismas fauces del Pastor. La bestia comió hasta saciarse y se marchó. Yo debí hallar la expiación allí, pero viví para contarlo. De no haberme expuesto tantas veces a su veneno siendo aún niño, también yo habría perecido».
languages.original_text: "A long time ago. I'd just become colonel. Out it came — not very close, but still close enough to be a problem. It almost gobbled up one of the outposts. My father and I took a squad and went out to attack it. They all perished and my father took our remaining grenades and leapt into the Drover's maw. The beast ate its fill and slunk away. I should have found my atonement there, but I made it out. If I hadn't been exposed to so much of its poison as a child, I would have died there."

traits.locale_text: «Hace mucho tiempo. Acababa de convertirme en coronel. Apareció de repente, no muy cerca, pero lo bastante para causar problemas. Casi se traga entero uno de los puestos de avanzada. Mi padre y yo formamos una escuadra y fuimos al ataque. Murieron todos, y mi padre cogió las últimas granadas que nos quedaban y se arrojó a las mismas fauces del Pastor. La bestia comió hasta saciarse y se marchó. Yo debí hallar la expiación allí, pero viví para contarlo. De no haberme expuesto tantas veces a su veneno siendo aún niño, también yo habría perecido».

languages.text: “很久以前，那时我刚当上上校，它就冒出来了——离得不算近，但也足以构成威胁。它差点吞掉一个前哨站。我父亲和我带了一个小队出去对付它。他们都死了，而我父亲拿着剩下的手雷，跳进了拒生花的巨口。那野兽饱餐一顿，便溜走了。我本该在那里赎清我的罪孽，但我活了下来。要不是从小吸了那么多它的毒气，我当时就得死在那里。”
languages.original_text: "A long time ago. I'd just become colonel. Out it came — not very close, but still close enough to be a problem. It almost gobbled up one of the outposts. My father and I took a squad and went out to attack it. They all perished and my father took our remaining grenades and leapt into the Drover's maw. The beast ate its fill and slunk away. I should have found my atonement there, but I made it out. If I hadn't been exposed to so much of its poison as a child, I would have died there."

traits.locale_text: “很久以前，那时我刚当上上校，它就冒出来了——离得不算近，但也足以构成威胁。它差点吞掉一个前哨站。我父亲和我带了一个小队出去对付它。他们都死了，而我父亲拿着剩下的手雷，跳进了拒生花的巨口。那野兽饱餐一顿，便溜走了。我本该在那里赎清我的罪孽，但我活了下来。要不是从小吸了那么多它的毒气，我当时就得死在那里。”

languages.text: "Das ist lange her. Ich war gerade Colonel geworden. Er kam heraus ... nicht sonderlich nahe, aber nahe genug, um ein Problem zu sein. Hätte beinahe einen der Außenposten verschlungen. Mein Vater und ich führten einen Trupp gegen ihn an. Alle unsere Leute fielen und mein Vater stürzte sich mit unseren verbliebenen Granaten in den Schlund des Treibers. Die Bestie fraß das Futter und schlich sich davon. Ich hätte dort Erlösung finden müssen, bin aber entkommen. Wäre ich dem Gift nicht schon als Kind ausgesetzt gewesen, wäre ich damals gestorben."
languages.original_text: "A long time ago. I'd just become colonel. Out it came — not very close, but still close enough to be a problem. It almost gobbled up one of the outposts. My father and I took a squad and went out to attack it. They all perished and my father took our remaining grenades and leapt into the Drover's maw. The beast ate its fill and slunk away. I should have found my atonement there, but I made it out. If I hadn't been exposed to so much of its poison as a child, I would have died there."

Alle unsere Leute fielen und mein Vater stürzte sich mit unseren verbliebenen Granaten in den Schlund des Treibers. Die Bestie fraß das Futter und schlich sich davon. Ich hätte dort Erlösung finden müssen, bin aber entkommen. Wäre ich dem Gift nicht schon als Kind ausgesetzt gewesen, wäre ich damals gestorben."
